subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath created the heavens and the earth and made subject the winds. The thunder doth praise Him in fear of Him, as do the clouds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من خلق السموات و الارض و سخر الاریاح یسبح له الرعد من خیفته و السحاب
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @chastisement and requital, @call to action
